heading: Authorization for acquisition of existing family housing in lieu of construction
label: 2824 Authorization for acquisition of existing family housing in lieu of construction
notes: Amendments1996—Subsec. (c). substituted “” for “the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1996”.Pub. L. 104–201February 10, 1996inserted at end “The Secretary concerned may waive the limitation set forth in the preceding sentence to family housing units acquired under this section during the five-year period beginning on the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1996.”Pub. L. 104–106
Effective DateFor effective date and applicability of section, see , set out as a note under .section 12(a) of Pub. L. 97–214section 2801 of this title
amendments: Amendments1996—Subsec. (c). substituted “” for “the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1996”.Pub. L. 104–201February 10, 1996inserted at end “The Secretary concerned may waive the limitation set forth in the preceding sentence to family housing units acquired under this section during the five-year period beginning on the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1996.”Pub. L. 104–106

children.label: a
children.text: In lieu of constructing any family housing units authorized by law to be constructed, the Secretary concerned may acquire sole interest in existing family housing units that are privately owned or that are held by the Department of Housing and Urban Development, except that in foreign countries the Secretary concerned may acquire less than sole interest in existing family housing units.

children.label: b
children.text: When authority provided by law to construct military family housing units is used to acquire existing family housing units under subsection (a), the authority includes authority to acquire interests in land.

children.label: c
children.text: The net floor area of a family housing unit acquired under the authority of this section may not exceed the applicable limitation specified in . The Secretary concerned may waive the limitation set forth in the preceding sentence to family housing units acquired under this section during the five-year period beginning on .section 2826 of this titleFebruary 10, 1996

children.label: d
children.text: Family housing units may not be acquired under this section through the exercise of eminent domain authority.
